title: Sample MCQ Exam
description: A polished demo exam for testing repository loading, grading, review, and exports.

questions.explanation: HTML stands for Hyper Text Markup Language and defines the structure of a web page.

questions.text: Which CSS property controls the space inside an element border?
questions.explanation: Padding is the internal space between content and the element border.

questions.text: Which JavaScript method converts a JSON string into an object?
questions.explanation: JSON.parse reads a JSON string and returns the matching JavaScript value.

questions.text: Which attributes help make form controls easier to use with assistive technology?
questions.explanation: ARIA labels can provide an accessible name when visible text is not enough.

questions.text: Which files are required for this static app to run on GitHub Pages?
questions.explanation: The deployed app is static, so the HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files are enough for the browser runtime.
